steps.title: Block the circle
steps.description: Sketch a light, loose circle the size you want the ball to be. Don't worry about perfection — you'll refine it next.

steps.title: Refine the outline
steps.description: Draw a single confident circle over your guide. One smooth pass reads better than many overlapping tries.

steps.title: Add the equator
steps.description: Draw a gentle curve across the middle (curving downward at the ends) to suggest the ball is a sphere, not a flat disc.

steps.title: Add the segment lines
steps.description: Add 2–3 curved lines from the top of the ball to the bottom, following the form. Spacing them unevenly looks more natural.

steps.title: Polish
steps.description: Erase any remaining guide lines and clean up any spots where strokes overshoot or don't meet cleanly.
